auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your projects
auth.magicLinkSent: Check your email for the login link
auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password
auth.resetPasswordSent: If an account exists with that email, you'll receive a password reset link.
auth.passwordUpdated: Password updated successfully! Redirecting to login...
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials and try again.
auth.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
auth.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log out and log back in.
auth.notLoggedIn: You must be logged in. Please refresh the page.
auth.noOrganization: Your account is not linked to any organization. Please contact an admin.
auth.slugExists: A project with this slug already exists. Please choose a different name.
auth.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Please log out and log back in, then try again.

admin.noResponsesYet: No responses yet. Share a project link to get started.
admin.deleteProjectConfirm: Delete project "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
admin.noResponsesInvite: No responses yet. Invite clients to start collecting requirements.
admin.previewFormTooltip: Click to preview the form your clients will see
admin.magicLinkCopied: Magic link copied! Share it with {email}
admin.reviewSubmissions: Review and manage client requirement submissions
admin.manageTemplatesDesc: Create and manage requirement form templates
admin.templatesDescription: Templates define the questions your clients will answer.
admin.setUpProject: Set up a new requirement collection project
admin.noInvitations: No invitations sent yet. Click "Send Invitation" to invite a client.
admin.magicLinkDescription: A magic link will be created and copied to your clipboard. Share it with the client. Expires in
admin.inviteDialogDesc: Send a magic link to a client so they can fill the requirement form.
admin.createNewTemplateDesc: Define a new requirement form template with questions for your clients.
admin.followUpDescription: Need more information from the client? Send a follow-up request that will be shown to them when they revisit the form.
admin.followUpPlaceholder: e.g., Could you clarify the user roles section? We need specific permission levels...

project.welcomeTextHelp: This message is shown to clients when they open the requirements form.
project.deadlineDaysHelp: Number of days the client has to submit requirements.
project.noProjects: No projects yet. Create your first project to get started.
project.templateHelp: Templates define the questions your clients will answer
project.defaultWelcome: Thank you for your interest in WMC and selecting us. Please provide your requirements within {days} days, so we can start analyzing and planning this app in our WMC Development Pipeline without any delay.
project.descPlaceholder: Brief description of what this project collects requirements for...

template.questionPlaceholderExample: e.g., What is the target audience?
template.defineQuestion: Define a new question for this section.
template.noQuestionsYet: No questions yet. Click "Add Question" to start.

form.welcomeSubtitle: Help us understand your project needs
form.uploadDragDrop: Drag and drop or click to upload
form.reviewSubtitle: Please review your responses before submitting
form.confirmSubmit: Are you sure you want to submit? You cannot edit after submission.
form.submittedMessage: Thank you! Your requirements have been received. The WMC team will review them within {days} business days.
form.summaryDescription: Generate an AI-powered summary of all your requirements for easy review.
form.aiGreeting: Hi! I'm your AI requirements assistant for "{project}". If you need help with any question or want to discuss your requirements, just ask me here.
form.markedLater: You have marked this to answer later.
form.waitQuestion: Wait, I have a question about this...
form.chatPlaceholder: Ask the AI assistant anything about this project...
form.projectNotFoundDesc: This project link may be invalid or the project is no longer accepting responses.
form.voiceNotSupported: Voice recording is not supported in this browser. Please use Chrome or Edge.
form.voiceError: Voice recognition error. Please try again.
form.dropFilesHere: Drop files here or click to upload
form.allowedFileTypes: PDF, Word, PowerPoint, Excel, Images (max 10MB each)
form.aiError: Sorry, I couldn't process that. Please try again.

response.clickGenerateSummary: Click "Generate Summary" to get an AI-powered executive summary of all responses.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
errors.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to access this page.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.linkExpired: This link has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.linkRevoked: This link is no longer valid. Please contact the project administrator.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is {size}MB.

client.myProjectsDescription: Here are the projects where your input is needed.
client.noProjectsDescription: You haven't been invited to any projects yet. When a project manager invites you, it will appear here.

settings.changePasswordDesc: Update your account password. You'll need to enter your current password for verification.
settings.currentPasswordWrong: Current password is incorrect. Please try again.

landing.heroSubtitle: The AI-powered portal for professional IT consultancies — gather, analyze, and manage project requirements in 25 languages.
landing.smartFormsDesc: Adaptive requirement forms with conditional logic, dynamic questions, and real-time validation.
landing.voiceInputDesc: Let clients speak their answers in any of 25 languages — AI transcribes, corrects, and structures automatically.
landing.aiInterviewerDesc: An AI interviewer guides clients through structured requirements — asking follow-ups, probing deeper, never missing a detail.
landing.multiLanguageDesc: Full support for all 24 EU official languages plus Turkish — forms, AI, and voice in every language.
landing.gdprCompliantDesc: Hosted in EU (Frankfurt), end-to-end encryption, and full GDPR compliance — built for European enterprises.
landing.realtimeDashboardDesc: Monitor response progress, completion rates, AI summaries, and team activity at a glance.
landing.step1Desc: Set up requirement forms with templates, custom questions, and AI-powered dynamic fields.
landing.step2Desc: Share a secure magic link with clients — no registration required, instant access.
landing.step3Desc: AI analyzes responses, generates executive summaries, and highlights critical requirements.
landing.heroSubtitleFull: Transform how you gather project requirements with AI-powered forms, voice input, and intelligent follow-ups — in 25 languages.
landing.everythingYouNeedDesc: Enterprise-ready tools designed for IT consultancies across Europe who want to impress clients from day one.
landing.ctaDesc: Join professional IT consultancies across Europe who save hours on every project with Anforderungsportal.
landing.stepsDesc: From project creation to analysis, we make it effortless.
